incoming: Hi, I forgot my password and can't log in to my account. Please help.
reply:
Hi there,

incoming: I was charged twice for my subscription this month. This is unacceptable.
reply:
Hi,

I sincerely apologize for the double charge. I've just processed a refund for the extra charge, which should appear on your statement in 3-5 business days. 

We've also added a $10 credit to your account for the inconvenience.

Best regards,
Support Team

incoming: Do you have a dark mode feature? My eyes hurt looking at the bright screen.
reply:
Hello,

Thanks for your feature request! We completely understand the need for a dark mode. Our engineering team is actually working on this right now, and we expect to roll it out in our next major update next month.

Thanks for your patience!

Best,
Support Team

incoming: How do I invite a teammate to my workspace?
reply:
Hi there,

Inviting a teammate is easy! Just go to Settings > Team, and click the 'Invite Member' button in the top right. You can enter their email address there.

Let me know if you need any further assistance.

Best,
Support Team
